ShortDescription.Value: Hide notification icons, add/remove money, pick milestones, achievements.

Publish.LongDescription:
# City Watchdog
City Watchdog is a redux and repair project for the old broken City Controller mod.
The goal is to keep the useful city-control features working with current Cities: Skylines II patches, clean up the codebase, and make the mod easier to maintain.
## Development status
This mod is still being repaired and modernized.
Use it as a work-in-progress utility mod while the takeover cleanup continues.
### Current features
- Manual add/subtract money controls. - Automatic add money option. - Unlimited money to limited money conversion. - Custom starting milestone option. - Achievement-enabler option when no separate achievement-enabler mod is detected. - Notification icon display/hide controls.
### Planned cleanup
- Remove old/unused shared-library code where possible. - Replace temporary legacy shared helpers with River-Mochi shared utilities where useful. - Improve publish text, Options UI labels, and translations. - Review notification controls against current game patch data. - Add cleaner diagnostics and status reporting.
### Notes
- This project is based on the abandoned MIT-licensed City Controller mod. - City Watchdog is maintained as a new River-Mochi takeover project. - The old original-author CS2Shared project dependency has been removed from City Watchdog. - No Harmony dependency is intended for the final cleaned version.
### Support and feedback
Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord.
### Credits - River Mochi - mod author + maintainer - Thanks to original City Controller mod by Mbyron26 - SonNathan - tester
